comment: Published lyrics from DuBose Heyward. Verse 1 (m1-m16). Chords left as Audiveris-detected -- they're approximately correct for this song. Demonstrates the per-song truth-overlay workflow on a song where tesseract OCR was particularly noisy.

3.comment: Pre-fix had 'expression' from stage direction; published is 'an' the livin' is eas-'

7.comment: Pre-fix had 'baal' as starting OCR garbage.
